creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
What’s your favourite Korean food ?? check out my video to find out what’s mine. ✨🥘🥬🍚🧆✨ 
Foodies ! Home cooks ! If you like Korean food or yet to try some... Participate in the “Korean Food Video Contest for Foreigners" by @hansik_official & stand to win cash prizes totalling US$37,000 🎉
from November 30th to December 6th. Judging will take place from December 14th ~ 16th, & the results will be announced on December 18th! 
.
Participating in any of the two themes:
✴️ 1. Kimchi-themed 'Cooking' video
✴️ 2. Korean Food 'Mukbang' video
.
Upload videos to YouTube and Instagram and you can easily enter the contest at www.playkoreanfood.com with required hashtags #Play_Korean_Food #Hansik #KoreanFood #Play_Hansik 
Sponsored by the Korean Food Promotion Institute in 2020
#dotzsoh #koreanmukbang

transcription.text: Hi, I'm Dot, and today we're going to eat Korean food. So before all the dishes are served, we are always served with amazing varieties of kimchi. And they are all really good vegetable dishes. And you can have it with you all the time. So the first dish I've got here is the beef bulgogi. Oh, look at that. It's nice and warm. It's beef, a little bit sweet. I love it. And I have their smoked duck here. It's one of the side dishes. A little bit of the mustard. It's really good. And I think so, the army stew, and it's on the stove. So we're going to wait for it to sizzle up a little bit. Oh, you know, a lot of ingredients. Yum, yum, yum. We're going to put the cheese in. It's so good. Thank you for watching!
